# Skills Board
> Skills Board is the shared library where a team collects the AI skills it recommends. Teammates search that library, see where each skill comes from, and choose the source, install command, ZIP, or MCP path that fits their agent setup.

Skills Board is free hosted SaaS with open-source code. A saved skill is a team recommendation, not a formal security review or compatibility certification. The product points to the latest version from the saved source and does not pin historical versions.

Key facts:
- Product category: shared AI skill library for teams
- Primary audience: small and mid-sized teams using a mix of Claude, Codex, Cursor, and other agents
- Usage paths per skill: original source, install command, ZIP download of the latest source files, or optional authenticated MCP access
- MCP capabilities: list and search team libraries, retrieve install commands, browse the public catalog, and save skills to a team library (no edit or delete)
- Hosted product: free forever, no trial, credit card, or paid tier

## Pages
- [Sitemap](https://skillsboard.sh/sitemap.xml): Indexable public URLs
- [Home](https://skillsboard.sh/): Product overview, pricing, and common questions
- [Pricing](https://skillsboard.sh/pricing.md): Machine-readable pricing details
- [Create account](https://skillsboard.sh/sign-up): Start a free team library
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/TommyBez/skillsboard): Open-source code

## Optional
- [Product homepage with FAQ](https://skillsboard.sh/#faq): Extractable answers about compatibility, MCP, catalogs, and free pricing
